text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"To my darling Big Bro. I have something
important to tell you."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"To my darling Big Sis. I have something
important to tell you."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Please see my next message for details. I'll be
waiting for you at 11 a.m. tomorrow. –Curren"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This message comes in the night with no warning.
It has a sense of unusual gravitas... I wonder if she
wants to talk about senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No, this is Curren Chan we're talking about. It
might not have anything to do with racing at all.
Unsure how to feel, I go to meet her the next
day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming, Big Bro. I said I have
something important to tell you, so let's just get
right to it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming, Big Sis. I said I have
something important to tell you, so let's just get
right to it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've figured out who my senior-year rivals will
most likely be, so I'd like to report them to you.
choice_data_list: (So she wants to talk about racing, after all!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's demeanor is much more serious
than usual. Understanding the need to be
professional and pay close attention, I sit up
straight.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, here's the information I gathered.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let me know right away if anything catches your
attention, 'kay? Here it goes...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let me know right away if anything catches your
attention, 'kay? Here it goes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan places what looks like her personal
tablet on the table and plays a video she seems
to have edited herself.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: "Hyaaah!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
"With the flame of justice in my heart, I rush to
the scene to destroy any and all evil! I am... Biko
Pegasus!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's Biko Pegasus. From what I've gathered,
she's thinking about running in next year's
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I'll be up against her soon. Not
only that, but...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: "Okay, everybody! Let's have a good time and..."

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: "Look out for more of my Umatoks!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Biko's big on UmaTok. She makes short
videos heavily inspired by superhero shows, so
kids and superhero fans are really into her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I guess you could call her a superhero UmaToker.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: "...Is it recording? Oh!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"Every day is buono! The bigger and tastier, the
better. ♪ I'm Hishi Akebonooo! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's Hishi Akebono. She's my friend and a really
good cook. She uses that skill to...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"I got a request to make a cake with cute flowers
on it, so on today's Umastagram Live, that's just
what I'm gonna do! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She's cute and tall but also uploads videos of her
making delicately designed cakes and other
dishes. She's a huge hit!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Flower, who I ran with before, specializes in
lunches, but Akebono doesn't box herself into to
a single genre.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She helped pioneer the food Umastagrammer
trend. Next up is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Got it! And... pause!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I thought I told you before, these are my future
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She did say that... but it just looks like she's
showing me all the Umamusume at Tracen
Academy who are popular on social media.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, if that's all, I'm gonna press play. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: "Howdy, y'all! It's me, Taiki Shuttle!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's Taiki Shuttle. She's a super cheerful daily
vlogger on UmaTube.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
"Today, I'm fixin' to have a good ol' fashioned
barbeque!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
"My folks sent me a buncha giiinormous steaks,
and we got a beeea-utiful blue sky today, so I
reckon it's time to fire up the grill!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She's got a huge personality, she's dynamic, and
she uploads, like, her entire life onto UmaTube.
Everyone loves her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Taiiikiii! How many times must I tell you not to
grill on school grounds?!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
"Well, if it isn't our first guest! Y'all know her
already—it's Air Groove!"

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: "Don't make me your guest!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"So, uhhh... Don't! Break! Academy! Rules!
M'kay?!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: "BOOM! Posted! AH-HAHAHA! Perfection!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"I really am the best class representative! I never
get tired of the day-to-day of class rep life..."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: "I mean, I'm posting academy rules to Umatter every day! Go me! I'm awesome! The incredible class rep!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She basically explained it already, but that's the
Sakura Bakushin O, the class representative.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"...Oh, a notification already! Maybe it's a student
complimenting me on a job well done!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: "WHAT?! My post says "do break academy rules"?! I posted the wrong thing?!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is getting big on Umatter
because of all her random posts and the terrifying
amount of typos they contain.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Well, that's about it. Those are my rivals.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think my biggest competition is Akebono since
she's an Umastagrammer too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Uh, Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Uh, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You haven't realized?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You haven't realized?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Come on. Even after seeing them all lined up like
this... you didn't notice anything?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus, Hishi Akebono, Taiki Shuttle, and
Sakura Bakushin O. The thing they all have in
common is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's super convenient for me, don't you think? The
stars of Umastagram, Umatter, and UmaTok are
all sprinters!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Throw me into the mix and we might even be able
to get more attention than the Derby or the
Tenno Sho... or even the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No, not just "might." I'm gonna make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whoever wins the biggest race... will totally be
the cutest runner. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm taking them all on next year!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm taking them all on next year!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm still ironing out all the details! Just look
forward to a bunch of fun stuff senior year. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's planning something... Today's
events tell me that I need to prepare myself for
whatever happens.
